description: A customer reports that their Visual Voicemail is not updating with new messages.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer's device and plan support Visual Voicemail.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the feature is supported and provisioned.

nodes.task_description: Check if the customer has a stable cellular data connection, as it is required for syncing.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent guides the customer to confirm they have an active data connection.

nodes.task_description: Reset the Visual Voicemail feature for the customer's line from the backend.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully uses the tool to reprovision the feature.
